translations.title: Perevirka suvoiv migratsii
translations.headerInfoText: Otrimuite tsilovi korolivstva migratsii za syloiu poshuku, a potim filtruite ta peregortajte storinky na odnomu ekrani. Danni API otrimuiutsia cherez lokalnyi proksi Node.js.
translations.searchPlaceholder: Filtr za korolivstvom, statusom abo reitynhom
translations.statusFilterHelp: Dostupnyi mnozhynnyi vybir. Yakshcho nichoho ne vybrano, budut pokazani vsi statusy.
translations.emptyState: Zhoden korolivstvo ne vidpovidaie potochnym filtram.
translations.noPowerCache: Dlia tsiiei syly poshuku nemaye keshu. Natysnit Otrymaty.
translations.invalidPowerInput: Vvedit sylu poshuku u formati {xxx.x}B abo {xxxx}M (pryklad: 3.5B).
translations.rankChartNoCachedPowers: No cached data exists. Fetch data first.
translations.rankChartInvalidSelection: Select multiple cached lists or enter a power range.
translations.rankChartLibraryMissing: Chart.js failed to load. Check your network connection and reload.
translations.rankChartExportLibraryMissing: html2canvas failed to load. Check your network connection and reload.
translations.rankChartNoData: No rank distribution can be plotted for the selected conditions.
translations.rankChartExportNoCharts: There are no charts to save as an image.
translations.rankChartExportDone: Saved the charts as one image.
translations.exportTableImageAria: Save the currently displayed table as an image
translations.rankChartPageNote: Показує розподіл з кроком 100M з кешованих даних.
